title: Mexican Avocado Salad
description: A fresh and light salad with a Peruvian twist, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: rich
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup of rich, creamy ranch dressing

ingredients.name: peruvian
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons of Peruvian aji amarillo sauce

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens and chopped cilantro.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the diced avocado, ranch dressing, and Peruvian aji amarillo sauce.
3. Pour the avocado mixture over the greens and toss to combine.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
